# FantasyVision

> FantasyVision is a free web-based Fantasy Eurovision Song Contest game. Players predict the finishing order of Eurovision contestants before the broadcast, score points based on placement accuracy, and compete in public or private leagues.

FantasyVision is available at https://www.fantasyvision.app and is free to use. Account creation is optional — unauthenticated users can build and save a prediction locally before signing up.

## How it works

Players drag and drop Eurovision contestants into their predicted finishing order before the contest airs. When official results are published, scores are calculated automatically across all saved predictions.

## Scoring system

Points are awarded based on how close each predicted placement is to the actual placement:

- Exact match (correct rank): 12 points
- Off by 1 place: 10 points
- Off by 2 places: 8 points
- Off by 3 places: 7 points
- Off by 4 places: 6 points
- Off by 5 places: 5 points
- Off by 6 places: 4 points
- Off by 7 places: 3 points
- Off by 8 places: 2 points
- Off by 9 places: 1 point
- Off by 10 or more places: 0 points

Scores remain null until official placement results are published. Once results are live, all saved predictions are scored retroactively.

## Leagues

Users can create public or private leagues for each contest. Private leagues use a join code (the last 8 alphanumeric characters of the league ID, uppercased). The leaderboard ranks all members by total prediction score. League creators cannot leave while other members remain in the league.

## Contest types

- Semi Final 1: Predict the finishing order of Semi Final 1 contestants
- Semi Final 2: Predict the finishing order of Semi Final 2 contestants
- Grand Final: Predict the Grand Final finishing order
- Combined: Rank all contestants. The top qualifiers become Grand Final picks. Bonus points are awarded for correctly predicting semi-final rankings within the qualifiers.

## Current contest

Eurovision Song Contest 2026 Grand Final predictions are open at https://www.fantasyvision.app/predict

## Sharing

Every saved prediction generates a unique shareable URL at /share/{predictionId} so users can compare picks before and after results are announced.

## Technical

- Frontend: React 19, React Router v7, Tailwind CSS v4, Vite
- Backend: Convex (real-time database and serverless functions)
- Authentication: Clerk (optional sign-in)
- Hosting: Vercel

## Legal

FantasyVision is an independent fan application. It is not affiliated with or licensed by the European Broadcasting Union (EBU). "Eurovision Song Contest" is a trademark of the EBU.

Privacy policy: https://www.fantasyvision.app/privacy
Terms of service: https://www.fantasyvision.app/terms
